form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months won by a 0.3 len at this track March 19 over 1673m defeating Irish Gent with 56kg at $3.80. Previously second-up ran last of 10 at this track on January 3 over 1710m, 7 len behind Pass The Hat carrying 55kg at $8.60. Among the top chances.
